sisyphus._note: GLM 5 — highest intelligence (49.6) + coding (44.2) in catalog. Replaces Opus for heavy orchestration.

hephaestus._note: Qwen3 Coder 480B — top coding model, comparable to Claude Sonnet on coding benchmarks.

oracle._note: GLM 5 Thinking — best reasoning with chain-of-thought for deep analysis tasks.

librarian._note: GLM 4.7 Flash — fast, cheap ($0.07/1M), strong enough for retrieval and knowledge lookup.

explore._note: Step 3.5 Flash — up to 350 t/s, $0.10/1M. Fastest capable model for quick exploration.

multimodal-looker._note: Qwen3 VL 235B — best vision-language model in catalog. OCR, charts, layout understanding.

prometheus._note: GLM 5 — same as sisyphus. Top intelligence for planning and strategy agents.

metis._note: DeepSeek V3.2 Thinking — thinking-in-tool-use capability, great for meta reasoning.

momus._note: DeepSeek V3.2 — solid general reasoning at medium cost. Good balance for momus role.

atlas._note: Kimi K2.5 — native multimodal + strong agentic tool-calling. Best agent model in catalog.

visual-engineering._note: Qwen3 VL 235B Thinking — best vision model with reasoning. Figma/UI → code workflows.

ultrabrain._note: GLM 5 Thinking — highest intelligence (49.6) with chain-of-thought. For hardest problems.

deep._note: DeepSeek V3.2 Thinking — strong deep reasoning (41.6 intelligence, 92.0 math).

artistry._note: Magnum v4 72B — top-tier prose quality. Best creative writing model in catalog.

quick._note: Step 3.5 Flash — 350 t/s, $0.10/1M. Fastest model for quick tasks.

unspecified-low._note: GLM 4.5 Air — best value general model. Strong SWE-bench, $0.10/1M flat.

unspecified-high._note: GLM 5 — best general model when quality matters. 49.6 intelligence, 200K context.

writing._note: Mistral Large 3 675B — excellent prose, multilingual, 256K max output. Great for writing.
